stories.title: Mold and Holywell projects among 20 to share £60,000 in police commissioner scheme
stories.summary: Four Flintshire community projects have been awarded a share of £60,000 through the Your Community, Your Choice 2026 fund, the North Wales Police and Crime Commissioner’s office has announced. Three of the four successful Flintshire projects are in Mold and the fourth is in Holywell. Age and Dementia Friendly Holywell has secured funding for a

stories.title: Jobs: North Wales posts biggest regional fall as Flintshire employment ranking drops
stories.summary: Flintshire has dropped out of the top three Welsh local authorities for employment rate in new Welsh Government figures published on 22 April 2026. In the latest Annual Population Survey figures covering the year ending 31 December 2025, the highest employment rates in Wales were in Newport at 76.9%, Monmouthshire at 76.8% and Pembrokeshire at

stories.title: Fewer patients seen by NHS dentists in north Wales as Welsh rate stays flat
stories.summary: The number of patients treated by NHS dentists in north Wales fell in each of the last three quarters, according to new Welsh Government figures published on 22 April 2026. Betsi Cadwaladr University Health Board had 233,622 patients treated in the 24-month period ending 31 December 2025. That is down from 236,950 in the 24-month

stories.title: Police release CCTV in search for man missing from Chester since February
stories.summary: Cheshire Police have renewed their appeal for a 39-year-old man who has been missing from Chester since February. Martin Conway was last seen overnight from Sunday 1 February to Monday 2 February 2026 in the Chester city centre area. Mr Conway is sometimes referred to as Kimberley, police said. Officers in Ellesmere Port have released

stories.title: Chester Zoo wants to stop real Paddington Bears from losing their home – and it has one week to raise £20,000
stories.summary: Chester Zoo supporters have just one week to raise £20,000 and help secure a future for real-life Paddington bears. The international conservation zoo is urging animal-lovers to take part in Big Give’s Earth Raise fundraiser between April 22-29 to protect the fragile forest home of Andean bears. Over this week, every donation will be match-funded
